description_long: This is a modern bed featuring a white frame with a prominent headboard decorated with three large orange circles. The bed is topped with a blue comforter that covers the lower half, while the upper half displays a patterned sheet in shades of white and blue. Two beige square pillows and two larger blue patterned pillows are arranged against the headboard, adding both comfort and visual interest. The mattress appears thick and plush, supported by a sturdy platform base with a slight orange trim along the edge. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a playful touch from the headboard's circular accents. The bed is suitable for a bedroom setting but could also be found in urban environments such as furnished apartments or model home displays.
description: A modern bed with a white frame, orange-accented headboard, blue comforter, and a mix of beige and blue pillows. The design is contemporary and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard with orange circles, blue comforter, and all four pillows clearly arranged.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the layering of bedding, and the profile of the pillows against the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard with orange circles and the overhanging pillows, with the bed frame's legs partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bedding layers and the arrangement of pillows from a different angle.
